### Basis

NAD+ Supplement for Cellular Aging

NAD+ is indispensable for life, and levels decline as we age. Basis is a daily supplement developed by renowned aging researcher Leonard Guarente, Ph.D., clinically proven to increase and sustain NAD+ levels.

![](//www.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Frame246_11b3639b-496e-485a-aa05-2871ffcde90a.jpg?v=1762188588&width=533)

### Matter

Tri-Vitamin Complex for Brain Aging

Matter, our breakthrough brain aging product developed in partnership with the University of Oxford, maintains memory and features a clinically proven B-vitamin complex patented to slow brain atrophy as you age.

![](//www.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Frame247.jpg?v=1762187783&width=533)

### Signal

Mitochondria Support for Metabolic Aging

Signal combines an efficient NAD+ precursor with a SIRT3 Activation Complex to target metabolic aging and support mitochondria, the powerhouses of your cells.

![](//www.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/Frame248.jpg?v=1762187949&width=533)

### Format

Immune Health + Inflammaging

An advanced immune supplement that addresses both the root causes and the downstream effects of an aging immune system by protecting healthy immune cells and combating inflammaging and cell senescence.

# Signal

Mitochondria Support for Metabolic Aging

$40

per
pouch

## Purchase Options

## Description

Power up the powerhouse of your cells. Signal is designed to target metabolic aging by protecting mitochondria—where the energy in your cells is made. Increase NAD+ with the precursor NMN to support energy production and activate SIRT3, a key mitochondrial enzyme, to protect and generate new mitochondria and help your cells adapt to daily metabolic changes as you age.

* Increase levels of the critical coenzyme NAD+ by 40% via the highly efficient precursor NMN
* Activate sirtuin 3 (SIRT3) to protect and generate new mitochondria to support cellular metabolism and energy
* Help maintain healthy insulin sensitivity in muscle—essential to maintaining blood sugar levels
* Support vascular health—critical for your athletic endurance
* Support brown fat thermogenesis, a cellular process which converts sugar and fat into heat to help maintain body temperature and support a healthy metabolism
* Reduce general tiredness and fatigue, support healthy muscle function, and feel good for your age

## Ingredients

Signal contains two ingredients that work synergistically to support metabolic health:

* **Nicotinamide Mononucleotide, NMN (250mg)**  
  NMN is a highly efficient precursor of the coenzyme nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+), which is central to creating cellular energy and performing other key metabolic functions.
* **SIRT3 Activation Complex (150mg)**  
  Supports healthy mitochondrial function through a combination of honokiol (isolated from the bark of *Magnolia officinalis*), and viniferin (derived from grapevines). Both honokiol and viniferin are potent activators of SIRT3, a metabolic enzyme found in the mitochondria that helps preserve existing as well as generate new mitochondria.
* Vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, nut-free, and contains no artificial colors or flavors.
* NSF Certified for Sport, the only independent third-party certification program recognized by the United States Anti-Doping Agency (USADA). Please confirm the certification of each lot [here](https://www.nsfsport.com/certified-products/search-results.php?keyword=elysium+health).
* See [nutrition label](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/signal-supplement-facts) for more information.
* The quality and purity information of every lot is [available here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/signal-lot-info).

## Recommended Use

* Take two capsules every morning, with or without food.
* Each pouch contains a 30-day supply.
* This product is only intended for healthy adults. Do not take if you are pregnant or nursing. Consult with your physician before using.

[View full details](/products/signal)

## Your Metabolism Ages Too

Metabolism converts food into the energy you need for life. As you age, your metabolism slows and becomes less efficient—impacting how quickly and effectively your cells function.

This happens for two main reasons: First, levels of a coenzyme called NAD+, which is central to hundreds of metabolic processes and cellular energy production, decline. Second, enzymes inside our mitochondria—the powerhouses of our cells—like SIRT3 that depend on NAD+ to function slow down.

## How to Target Metabolic Aging in Your Cells

Signal restores the age-related decline in NAD+ levels with NMN, one of the most efficient precursors of NAD+. A human clinical study demonstrated that 30 days of NMN supplementation at 250mg/day resulted in a 40% increase in NAD+ levels in the blood. NMN supplementation has been shown to support insulin sensitivity, vascular health (critical for athletic endurance), and muscle function.

[See the science](/pages/science-behind-signal)

> ### “Signal is a novel, mitochondria-centric product formulated to counter aging-dependent declines in metabolism by promoting youthful energetics and metabolic efficiency.”

**Leonard Guarente, Ph.D.,** Elysium founder, chief scientist, and renowned aging researcher and professor

## Activating SIRT3 to Support Mitochondrial Health

What happens inside your mitochondria is crucial. All your metabolic processes take place here, from energy production and synthesis of cellular building blocks to waste management. The mitochondrial protein SIRT3 drives many of these reactions, as well as protects and generates new mitochondria. The natural ingredients in Signal’s SIRT3 Activation Complex, honokiol and viniferin, are designed to work with NMN to activate SIRT3 to promote mitochondrial health and synthesis, which in turn support metabolic health.

NMN supplements contain the molecule nicotinamide mononucleotide, a precursor to NAD+ that shows promise in supporting multiple aspects o...](/blogs/aging101/how-to-choose-an-nmn-supplement)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Signal and what does it do?

Signal is designed to target metabolic aging at the cellular level by elevating levels of a key metabolite, NAD+, which declines universally with age, and by activating processes involved in supporting mitochondrial health.

### How is Signal different from Basis?

The combination of ingredients in Signal is designed to promote metabolic health, whereas Basis is formulated to target overall cellular aging and DNA maintenance. As metabolic aging is tightly correlated with general aging, there is overlap in the downstream effects of the ingredients in Signal and Basis, and this is reflected in the principal ingredient in both products. As declining NAD+ levels are directly related to general aging and metabolic dysregulation, both Signal and Basis provide an NAD+ precursor molecule to target this decline–Signal contains NMN and Basis contains NR. There is some exciting, early evidence for potential tissue-specificity between the two different NAD+ precursors, as well as varied benefits, suggesting that one precursor may be more dominant in certain tissues than the other. More studies are needed to support this possibility.  
  
In addition to NAD+ precursors, both products provide ingredients that activate sirtuins–a family of enzymes that play a critical role in aging and metabolism. Signal contains Elysium’s SIRT3 Activation Complex, which activates sirtuin 3 (SIRT3), a sirtuin that resides in mitochondria and has been shown to be involved in maintaining mitochondrial health and the generation of new mitochondria. Basis, on the other hand, contains an ingredient that activates sirtuin 1 (SIRT1). Unlike SIRT3, SIRT1 resides mainly in the nucleus and plays an important role in regulating gene expression and histone modification, pointing to a more complex role for this enzyme in modulating a wide array of processes involved in cellular housekeeping, including DNA maintenance. The SIRT1 activator in Basis has also been shown to exhibit antioxidant properties.

### I’m already taking Basis, why should I take Signal as well?

There is preclinical evidence for potential tissue-specificity as well as varied benefits between the two different NAD+ precursors in Basis and Signal. More research is needed to support these findings, but taking both Basis and Signal may help ensure that NAD+ levels are elevated across a broader range of tissues, and that you’re receiving the benefits offered by each NAD+ precursor. In addition, the secondary ingredients in Signal and Basis target different processes in your cells–Signal activates an enzyme that’s involved in mitochondrial function and biogenesis whereas Basis activates an enzyme that is involved in regulating gene expression. We believe that taking both products can lead to a more comprehensive approach to targeting different aspects of aging that includes cellular and metabolic aging.

### What is SIRT3 and what are the potential benefits of activating it?

SIRT3 or sirtuin 3 is a member of the sirtuin family of enzymes that depend on NAD+ to function. SIRT3 enzymes reside in mitochondria and play an essential role in maintaining mitochondrial health and metabolic control, including glucose metabolism, cellular energy (ATP) production, fatty acid oxidation, ketone production during fasting, and amino acid cycling. Mitochondria are central hubs for metabolic reactions and produce ~95% of the cell’s energy. As we age, mitochondrial function and levels of mitochondrial sirtuins decline, leading to metabolic dysregulation. Signal is designed to activate SIRT3 and thus promote mitochondrial and metabolic health.

### What is NMN?

NMN (nicotinamide mononucleotide) is the immediate precursor to NAD+, an essential coenzyme and key metabolite found in every cell of the human body, and involved in over 500 different cellular reactions. NAD+ is synthesized by the cell through various pathways, some more complex than others. The primary pathway for NAD+ synthesis involves the conversion of nicotinamide (NAM) to NMN and subsequent conversion of NMN to NAD+. As the immediate precursor to NAD+, NMN is a highly efficient precursor, requiring the least amount of steps and energy to convert to NAD+.

### What is metabolic aging?

Metabolic aging is the imbalance or dysregulation of our metabolism as a function of aging. As we age, levels of NAD+ decline dramatically. NAD+ is a key metabolite whose levels are closely monitored by the cell in order to tune and balance its metabolic reactions. Regulating the vast number of metabolic reactions to maintain balance or homeostasis between energy production and usage is critical for cell health. In addition to the decline in NAD+ level, the activity and levels of sirtuins (NAD-dependent enzymes involved in regulating metabolism and maintaining energy homeostasis) also decline. The ingredients in Signal are designed to work synergistically to promote metabolic balance and health by elevating NAD+ levels and activating sirtuin 3.

### Can I take Signal alongside my other Elysium supplements?

All of our supplements, Basis, Matter, Format, Signal, Mosaic, and Vision are safe to be taken together. While we have identified no interactions or contraindications to date, if you have questions about a health condition or about making changes to your health routine, we recommend consulting your physician.

## Description

Your skin is your largest organ, and your most visible. It faces the world and protects you from it. As you age, your skin loses elasticity and moisture–making it more susceptible to environmental and internal stress. To achieve deep, systemic benefits and maintain radiant, youthful skin, you need to support your skin’s natural regenerative processes and drive changes **from the inside**.

Enter **Mosaic**, a whole-body supplement that fights skin aging from the innermost layers:

*   Clinically proven, visible results in as little as 3 weeks*
*   First and only product with the clinically proven Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex in combination with hyaluronic acid
*   Increases moisture content, reduces fine lines and wrinkles, and improves texture—in a daily softgel
*   Developed with the advisement of Dr. Richard Granstein, a world-renowned leader in the field of dermatology

###### *Individual results may vary. This timeline may differ from the typical user’s experience and is not intended to represent or guarantee that every user will achieve the same or similar results.

## Ingredients

Mosaic contains powerful ingredients to combat skin aging from the innermost layers:

*   **Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex**: A clinically proven, first-of-its-kind formulation that’s unique to Mosaic combines carotenoids and phytonutrients derived from tomato and rosemary extracts that work synergistically to protect, restore, and enhance your skin. The Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex is clinically proven to reduce fine lines and wrinkles and improve skin texture and radiance.
*   **Hyaluronic Acid**: Oral hyaluronic acid goes where topicals cannot. Clinical studies show that oral supplementation with hyaluronic acid increases whole-body skin moisture content throughout the layers of the skin, improves skin barrier function, and increases skin elasticity.
*   Additional ingredients include**sea buckthorn oil**and**blackcurrant seed oil**—sources of omega-3, 6, and 7 fatty acids to support healthy skin.
*   Gluten-free, nut-free, and contains no artificial flavors.
*   See[nutrition label](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/mosaic-supplement-facts)for more information.
*   The quality and purity information of every lot is[available here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/mosaic-lot-info).

## Recommended Use

*   One softgel in the morning, with or without food.
*   Each pouch contains a 30-day supply.
*   This product is intended for healthy adults. If pregnant or nursing, consult with your physician before using.

[View full details](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/products/mosaic)

## Mosaic Journey

## Week 2

After just 2 weeks, circulating carotenoid levels are significantly higher, providing nourishment to the body as a whole.

*Individual results may vary. This timeline may differ from the typical user’s experience and is not intended to represent or guarantee that every user will achieve the same or similar results.

## Week 3

Mosaic contains hyaluronic acid (HA), a humectant that’s capable of binding 1,000 times its weight in water. Clinical studies demonstrate that oral supplementation with HA results in increased skin moisture content and improved texture in just 3 short weeks.

## 1 Month

In just 4 weeks, skin carotenoid levels will have increased significantly, building up a natural reservoir of free radical-fighting phytonutrients in skin tissues to help protect collagen.

## 2 Months

The phytonutrients are hard at work protecting and maintaining collagen and elastin fibers, components of your skin that are crucial for maintaining its structure, elasticity, and overall appearance. In one study of the Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex, 65% of people exhibited a reduction in visually perceivable wrinkles after just two months.

## 3 Months

At 12 weeks, oral supplementation with HA is clinically demonstrated to improve skin smoothness, elasticity, dryness, and barrier function.

But there is more to Mosaic than surface-level benefits. The Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex also reduces the expression of genes associated with inflammation for a balanced response to environmental stressors, including pollution, diet, and sun exposure.

## 4 Months

At 16 weeks, skin carotenoid levels are now 31% higher, resulting in improved tone, brightness, radiance, and a reduction in the appearance of both deep and fine wrinkles.

## A Breakthrough for Skin Aging

Carotenoids are the latest breakthrough in skin longevity. Mosaic’s Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex is a first-of-its-kind, clinically proven formulation designed to elevate carotenoid levels in the skin to combat both internal and external stressors and reduce fine lines and wrinkles.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Mosaic and what does it do?

Mosaic is a breakthrough skin care supplement developed by Elysium Health with the advisement of Dr. Richard Granstein, chair of the Department of Dermatology at Weill Cornell Medicine for nearly 30 years and one of the world’s foremost experts in dermatology. Mosaic features the unique, clinically proven Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex, which helps to develop a “foundation” for the ideal cellular environment to counter key stressors that drive skin aging. In a single daily softgel, Mosaic combats skin aging from the innermost layers for visibly healthy, youthful skin.

### What is the Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex and how does it support more radiant, youthful skin?

Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex is a blend of plant-based antioxidants, including carotenoids. This revolutionary new composition neutralizes free radicals, protects collagen and elastin, supports skin resilience, and helps combat signs of aging, contributing to more youthful-looking skin.

### What are carotenoids?

Carotenoids are a group of organic compounds that give many fruits and vegetables their vibrant shades of red, orange, and yellow. At a molecular level, carotenoids play a critical role as antioxidants, protecting plants from damage by light and oxygen. When we consume these foods, our bodies (and skin) can benefit from these protective properties too. Think of carotenoids as nature's colorful shield, both for the plants that contain them and for us when we include these foods in our diet. You can learn more about the skin benefits of carotenoids[here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/carotenoids-and-skin-health).

### What is hyaluronic acid?

Hyaluronic acid (HA) is a naturally occurring molecule in the human body that plays a pivotal role in maintaining skin hydration. Found in significant amounts in the skin, eyes, and joints, HA has the unique ability to retain water, assisting in keeping tissues well lubricated. Maintaining proper barrier function is critical for skin health. Fewer natural oils, decreased cell renewal, and cumulative effects from external stressors lead to increased moisture loss as we age. As we age, our skin also produces less HA (by age 60, we have half as much HA in the epidermis compared to our 20s). Unlike topicals, which are limited to the skin surface and area of application, oral administration of HA at the dose in Mosaic increases moisture throughout the different layers of the skin, including layers not reached by most topicals.

### Is Mosaic better than topical skin care products?

Mosaic is a great complement to topical products and an essential first step in your comprehensive skin care routine. Topical products address only the skin's outermost layer and are limited to the area of application, while Mosaic works from within to support all layers of the skin across the entire body, providing a whole-body approach to skin care.

### Will Mosaic promote collagen production?

Mosaic supports healthy, radiant, youthful skin by maintaining natural collagen and elastin levels and supporting the internal structural elements in your skin to bolster its inherent defenses against environmental stressors that degrade collagen. You can learn more about collagen and skin aging[here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/collagen-and-skin-aging).

### How quickly does Mosaic start working?

After only two weeks, your circulating carotenoid levels may be significantly higher, providing nourishment to your whole body. Proven results of increased skin moisture content and improved skin texture may be visible at 3 weeks with a Corneometer CM 825, the gold standard for assessing skin moisture content in the clinical setting. In just 4 weeks, the carotenoid levels in your skin may have increased by 15%, building up a natural reservoir of free radical-fighting phytonutrients in skin tissues to help protect collagen. With just a single daily softgel for 12 weeks, you may see improvements in skin smoothness, elasticity, dryness, and barrier function. At 16 weeks, you’ll have 31% higher carotenoid levels in your skin, leading to improved tone, brightness, radiance, and a reduction in the appearance of both deep and fine wrinkles. As you continue to take Mosaic, it will continue to support whole-body skin health. Individual results may vary. This timeline may differ from the typical purchaser’s experience, and is not intended to represent or guarantee that anyone will achieve the same or similar results.

### Are there any human clinical trials supporting Mosaic’s benefits?

Human clinical trials have demonstrated that the Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex in Mosaic significantly increases skin carotenoid levels, reduces fine lines and deep wrinkles, and protects the skin against environmental stressors. The hyaluronic acid in Mosaic has also been shown in human clinical trials to significantly increase moisture levels in the skin. Please visit the[Science Behind Mosaic page](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/science-behind-mosaic)for a more complete review of the studies.

### How do subscriptions work?

Our prepaid subscription plans are our most cost-effective options. When you select a prepaid annual plan, the pricing offers savings to customers who commit to a long-term subscription. Prepaid subscriptions are considered final sale, so if you cancel in the middle of a prepaid plan, you will continue to receive the remaining shipments, and the cancellation will take effect at the end of your plan before renewal. Our monthly subscriptions are $75/month and can be canceled at any time prior to your next shipment. You can also place a single-purchase order by selecting “Individual Purchase” on the checkout page for $90. Please contact our Customer Experience Team at care@elysiumhealth.com if you need to talk about your plan.
